title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: Good morning, everybody. I just woke up and today is my birthday, so I'm going to show you my perfect day. I'm going to do some of my favorite activities, eat some of my favorite foods, and just spend the day enjoying myself. To kick things off, I'm going to hit the gym. I've been working with a personal trainer lately, and I love starting the day by being active and moving my body. No excuses today. I just hope it's not like day. Let's get going.

I just got to the gym and I'm waiting for my trainer, so I'm going to warm up my body and do a bit of stretching. This is my trainer. She's so ripped and as the young kids these days would say, her body is T. Today we are focusing on my back, not like day, so I guess it really is my perfect day today. Let's go. Let's go. One, two, one. I just finished up at the gym and wah, she kicked my butt today. She does not go easy on me, which is good because sometimes I need that extra push. But now I'm heading home to take a shower and clean up a bit. Before I hop in the shower, I'm going to make a quick smoothie. I love smoothies after workouts because they are fast and easy, impact with nutrients. Spinach. Let's finish up the rest of the bag. Frozen blueberries, one banana, one scoop of pea protein, and some almond milk. Let's blend this up.

I have to do this quickly. No time to spare. It's time to pick out an outfit. Since it's my perfect day, I want to look and feel my best. I think I'm going to wear this robe today. It's bright and fun and comfortable, so it's one of my favorite things that I own. Whenever I wear this, I get compliments on it, which is kind of ironic because I actually bought this about five years ago for monwon at a subway station in Seoul. It was a great deal. It's very summery, so I have to wear it one last time before it gets too cold. I'm on my way to a nail appointment now. I was running late, so I had to call a cab. I'm really excited because I never get my nails done, so this is a real treat.

They're on sale. 30% off. I sniffed all the candles, and I'm very indecisive, but I think I narrowed it down to my two favorite scents. I like the pistachio milk and honey, and the cinnamon spiced vanilla. I'm going to go to the actual store and see if they have those smaller candles in stock. They have a lot more options here. Thank you so much. Okay, thank you.
Thank you. Thank you. Come to me. People are going to smell me from a mile away. Wow, we can't go in an elevator. Let me walk quickly to try and get rid of this.

title: will / shall
examples: In Busan, just for like one month, but I lived in Seoul before for like 10 years. My cuticles are in really rough shape, so she's cleaning them up. You know what sounds really good right now? Some coffee. Sounds really good. Intense. In my family, when it's your birthday, we call you the birthday brat. That means you can boss people around and do whatever you want for one day only. I'm taking full advantage of that title, so cameraman, will you go get me a coffee please?

Thank you. I went for something a bit more neutral this time because I have some business meetings and events coming up, so I can't have anything too flashy, but still it's a little bit shimmery. I love it. I'll be back for sure. Thank you so much. Thank you. See you next time. Tempting. I want to buy it, but then it shows you how many calories there are.

I think my trainer would not be too happy after working out so hard this morning, and then getting crispy cream donuts. I'll save my appetite for the food court. Oh, bath and body. We passed by bath and body works, and I had to take a peek at their candles.

To be honest, shopping kind of stresses me out because I'm an overthinker. So I always go back and forth comparing different things and it takes forever but that's okay. I still got a candle and maybe I'll try to do some online shopping to get the things that I need. Thank you. Can we do a half and half of the Brooklyn's best and the spinach? Oh, right. How many pieces is that?

Thank you guys so much for spending my birthday with me today. I'm so grateful for each and every one of you and I hope this year I can meet more of you in person and I hope that our community continues to grow. Vanessa, please say your wish. You're right. Cut that part. Cut, cut. Check out the pinned comment below and I'll see you next time. Goodbye!

I feel like I constantly ate today. I was a bottomless pit. This is really good though. Carrot cake was a good choice.
